summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MyBase Personal Life OS. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend has critical SelectItem component issues preventing full CRUD operations. French interface mostly working with minor text issues.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem components cannot have empty string values, causing runtime errors and preventing dialog forms from opening
ui_bugs.selector: Select components in inventory, wishlist, projects, content, and portfolio forms
ui_bugs.error_message: A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string. This is because the Select value can be set to an empty string to clear the selection and show the placeholder.

integration_issues.issue: Form dialogs fail to open due to SelectItem errors, preventing creation/editing of items

design_issues.details: Navigation shows 'Contenu' instead of 'Bibliothèque' for Content page

passed_tests: All backend CRUD operations (Collections, Inventory, Wishlist, Projects, Tasks, Content, Portfolio)
Dashboard stats and recent items API
Dashboard page loading and stats display
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix SelectItem components by ensuring no empty string values are passed to SelectItem value prop. Replace empty strings with undefined or remove SelectItem for empty values. This is blocking all CRUD form operations in the frontend.
